title: June 25
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|June|hide31=yes}}

'''June 25''' is the 176th day of the year (177th in leap years), with 189 days remaining.</noinclude>
*[[1950s#1958|1958]] – [[Joyce Kurtz]] is born.
*[[1979]] – [[Nathan Hamill]] is born.
*[[1980]] – [[The Empire Strikes Back Weekly 122|''The Empire Strikes Back Weekly'' 122]] published.
*[[1996]] – [[Splinter of the Mind's Eye 4|''Splinter of the Mind's Eye'' 4]] published.
*1996 – [[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 9|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 9]] published.
*[[1997]] – [[Dark Force Rising 2|''Dark Force Rising'' 2]] published.
*[[2003]] – ''[[Star Wars Tales 16]]'' published.
*[[2008]] – [[Dark Times 12|''Dark Times'' 12]] published.
*2008 – ''[[Star Wars: Legacy Volume 3: Claws of the Dragon]]'' published.
*[[2013]] – ''[[Star Wars: Attack of the Clones: The Ultimate Illustrated Guide]]'' was to be released in the North American market, but was cancelled.
*[[2014]] – [[Rebel Heist 3|''Rebel Heist'' 3]] published.
*2014 – [[Legacy (2013) 16|''Legacy'' (2013) 16]] published.
*[[2019]] – ''[[Star Wars: Doctor Aphra Vol. 5 — Worst Among Equals]]'' published.
*[[2020]] – [[Joe Sinnott]] dies.
*[[2021]] – "[[Bounty Lost]]" airs on [[Disney+]].
*2021 – ''[[Star Wars: The Bad Batch, Volume 1 (Episodes 1-8)]]'' soundtrack released.
*[[2022]] – [[Lop & Ochō (manga)|''Lop & Ochō'']] manga adaptation published in Japan.
*[[2024]] – [[Star Wars Insider 226|''Star Wars Insider'' 226]] published.
*2024 – "[[Night]]" airs on Disney+.
*[[2025]] – [[Legacy of Vader 5|''Legacy of Vader'' 5]] published.
*2025 – [[The High Republic Adventures (2023) 19|''The High Republic Adventures'' (2023) 19]] published.
<noinclude>
